parameters.formTitle: Vendor Document Submission - Certa Risk Platform
parameters.formDescription: Upload all vendor onboarding documents for AI-powered risk analysis. Accepted formats: PDF, DOCX, CSV, PNG, JPG.

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first();
const splitData = $('Split Files into Items').first().json;

return [{
  json: {
    file_index:       splitData.file_index,
    filename:         splitData.filename,
    mimetype:         splitData.mimetype,
    file_size:        splitData.file_size,
    binary_key:       splitData.binary_key,
    packet_id:        splitData.packet_id,
    vendor_name:      splitData.vendor_name,
    vendor_category:  splitData.vendor_category,
    submitter_email:  splitData.submitter_email,
    packet_reference: splitData.packet_reference,
    today:            splitData.today,
    expected_docs:    splitData.expected_docs,
    total_files:      splitData.total_files,
    submitted_at:     splitData.submitted_at,

    extracted_text:     '',
    extraction_method:  'docx_unsupported',
    is_image:           false,
    is_base64:          false,
    extraction_success: false,
    extraction_note:    'DOCX format not supported by native extractor in this n8n version. Convert to PDF before submission.',
    flags: [{
      flag_id:           'FLAG_FORMAT_001',
      flag_type:         'incomplete_submission',
      severity:          'medium',
      title:             'DOCX format not extractable',
      detail:            'File ' + splitData.filename + ' is in DOCX format which cannot be automatically extracted. Manual review required.',
      field_reference:   'file_format',
      days_until_expiry: null,
    }],
    recommended_action: 'review',
    action_reason:      'DOCX extraction not supported — manual review required',
    summary:            'File ' + splitData.filename + ' could not be automatically extracted. Please convert to PDF and resubmit.',
  },
  binary: {},
}];

const item = $input.first();
const data = item.json;

return [{
  json: {
    file_index:         data.file_index,
    filename:           data.filename,
    mimetype:           data.mimetype,
    file_size:          data.file_size,
    binary_key:         data.binary_key,
    packet_id:          data.packet_id,
    vendor_name:        data.vendor_name,
    vendor_category:    data.vendor_category,
    submitter_email:    data.submitter_email,
    packet_reference:   data.packet_reference,
    today:              data.today,
    expected_docs:      data.expected_docs,
    total_files:        data.total_files,
    submitted_at:       data.submitted_at,
    extracted_text:     '',
    extraction_method:  'vision_png',
    is_image:           true,
    is_base64:          true,
    extraction_success: true,
  },
  binary: item.binary || {},
}];

const item = $input.first();
const data = item.json;

return [{
  json: {
    file_index:         data.file_index,
    filename:           data.filename,
    mimetype:           data.mimetype,
    file_size:          data.file_size,
    binary_key:         data.binary_key,
    packet_id:          data.packet_id,
    vendor_name:        data.vendor_name,
    vendor_category:    data.vendor_category,
    submitter_email:    data.submitter_email,
    packet_reference:   data.packet_reference,
    today:              data.today,
    expected_docs:      data.expected_docs,
    total_files:        data.total_files,
    submitted_at:       data.submitted_at,
    extracted_text:     '',
    extraction_method:  'vision_jpeg',
    is_image:           true,
    is_base64:          true,
    extraction_success: true,
  },
  binary: item.binary || {},
}];

parameters.subject: =CRITICAL FLAG — {{ $json.vendor_name }} | {{ $json.document_name }}
parameters.message:
=

🚨 Critical Risk Flag Detected

Certa Vendor Risk Agent — Automated Alert

Immediate action required — this vendor packet contains one or more critical risk flags.

Vendor Name {{ $json.vendor_name }}
Document {{ $json.document_name }}
Document Type {{ $json.document_type }}
Packet ID {{ $json.packet_id }}
Max Severity CRITICAL
Flag Count {{ $json.flag_count }}
Recommended Action {{ $json.recommended_action }}
Submitted By {{ $json.submitter_email }}
Submission Date {{ $json.submitted_at }}

Agent Summary

{{ $json.summary }}

Critical Flags Detected ({{ $json.flag_count }})

{{ $json.action_reason }}

This is an automated alert from the Certa Vendor Risk Agent.
Please review the full analysis in your Google Sheets dashboard and take appropriate action.
